title: Investment Analyst
description: T. Rowe Price, a global investment management leader, seeks an Investment Analyst for our Cambridge office. You'll analyze securities, conduct investment research, and contribute to portfolio decisions for our investment teams. Work onsite in a prestigious environment where rigorous research and investment discipline drive exceptional long-term returns.
responsibilities: Conduct fundamental security analysis and investment research
Build financial models and valuation analyses
Monitor companies and sectors within assigned coverage areas
Present findings and recommendations to portfolio managers
Evaluate risks and opportunities in assigned securities
Collaborate with portfolio management and trading teams

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field; MBA preferred
skills: Financial analysis and modeling (Excel proficiency required)
Understanding of accounting and financial statements
Knowledge of specific sectors or asset classes (preferred)
certifications: CFA Level I completed or in progress (preferred)

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and wellness benefits
CFA exam study materials and reimbursement
